definitions.text: tilpasning eller omdannelse til noe allerede eksisterende
definitions.translation: adaptation or transformation into something already existing

definitions.text: politisk framdrevet eller selvdreven prosess der en minoritetsgruppe blir mer lik en majoritet
definitions.translation: politically driven or self-driven process where a minority group becomes more like a majority

definitions.text: som faguttrykk i blant annet språkvitenskap, geologi, fysiologi, psykologi og botanikk: det å assimilere
definitions.translation: as a technical term in linguistics, geology, physiology, psychology, and botany, among others: the act of assimilating
